sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Business inventory for Burbank, IL (zip 60459). Total businesses cataloged: 379. Combined with adjacent Archer Heights (60632): 1217 total across both areas in the elko.ai business database.

sections.heading: Top Business Types in Burbank
sections.body: Breakdown of business categories found via OpenStreetMap data.

sections.heading: Key Commercial Areas
sections.body: Burbank's main commercial corridor is Cicero Avenue, hosting approximately 2.5 million square feet of retail GLA including Burbank Station (303K sf), Burbank Plaza (Jewel-Osco anchored), and the adjacent Ford City Mall (1.2M sf).

sections.heading: Research Notes
sections.body: Web-enriched context about Burbank's business environment.

research_notes.note: Cicero Avenue through Burbank is a major retail corridor with ~2.5M sq ft of retail GLA. Key centers: Burbank Station (303K sf, grocery-anchored at 7730 S Cicero), Burbank Plaza (Jewel-Osco anchored at 79th & Cicero), and Ford City Mall (1.2M sf) directly adjacent. Traffic counts of 69,100 vehicles/day at 79th & Cicero intersection. Also anchored by Best Buy, HomeGoods, PetSmart, Ashley Furniture.

Burbank is primarily a retail and residential suburb (population ~28,500). Major employment comes from the Cicero Avenue retail corridor, schools (Burbank SD 111, Reavis HS), and nearby industrial areas in Bedford Park and Archer Heights to the north. Light industrial/logistics facilities are limited within Burbank proper compared to adjacent Archer Heights/Clearing industrial corridors.

303,566 sf regional power center at 7730 S Cicero Ave. Anchored by Food 4 Less, HomeGoods, Bob's Discount Furniture, Babies R Us, PetSmart, Sports Authority, Ashley Furniture. Built in 2004. Occupies the former Ford City Mall parking field. Represents a significant commercial node in the southwest suburbs.

Active chamber supporting local businesses. Located at 5501 W 79th St, Burbank IL 60459. Directory includes ~100+ member businesses across retail, services, construction, and professional services sectors.
